steps: Go to https://admin.typeform.com and log in to your Typeform account
Click on your account name in the top-right corner and select 'My Account'
In the left sidebar, click 'Personal tokens'
Enter a descriptive name for the token (e.g. 'My App')
Select the required scopes (read, write forms/responses/webhooks as needed)
Click 'Generate token' and copy the token immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Personal Access Token
credential_fields.description: Typeform personal access token used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Personal access tokens are used as Bearer tokens: Authorization: Bearer <token>
The token is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately
Free plan available; paid plans unlock more responses per month
Tokens can be scoped to specific permissions (forms:read, forms:write, responses:read, etc.)
Typeform is a GitHub secret scanning partner — avoid committing tokens to repositories

test_endpoint.description: List all forms in the account
